attributes.title: [Oracle WebLogic OTel] Transactions & Work Managers
attributes.description: JTA transaction health and per-application work manager analysis for Oracle WebLogic Server. Tracks transaction commit/rollback/abandon rates and application-level request processing.

params.markdown:
## [Oracle WebLogic OTel] Transactions & Work Managers

JTA transaction and work manager analysis for WebLogic Server:
- Transaction commit, rollback, and abandon rates
- Active in-flight transaction counts
- Per-application work manager request throughput
- Stuck threads by application and work manager
- Work manager pending request queue depths

query.esql:
TS metrics-oracle_weblogic.otel-*
| WHERE weblogic.jta.transactions.total IS NOT NULL
| STATS total_rate = SUM(RATE(weblogic.jta.transactions.total))

TS metrics-oracle_weblogic.otel-*
| WHERE weblogic.jta.transactions.total IS NOT NULL
| STATS total_rate = SUM(RATE(weblogic.jta.transactions.total))

TS metrics-oracle_weblogic.otel-*
| WHERE weblogic.jta.transactions.committed IS NOT NULL
| STATS committed_rate = SUM(RATE(weblogic.jta.transactions.committed))

TS metrics-oracle_weblogic.otel-*
| WHERE weblogic.jta.transactions.committed IS NOT NULL
| STATS committed_rate = SUM(RATE(weblogic.jta.transactions.committed))

TS metrics-oracle_weblogic.otel-*
| WHERE weblogic.jta.transactions.rolled_back IS NOT NULL
| STATS rollback_rate = SUM(RATE(weblogic.jta.transactions.rolled_back))

TS metrics-oracle_weblogic.otel-*
| WHERE weblogic.jta.transactions.rolled_back IS NOT NULL
| STATS rollback_rate = SUM(RATE(weblogic.jta.transactions.rolled_back))

TS metrics-oracle_weblogic.otel-*
| WHERE weblogic.jta.transactions.abandoned IS NOT NULL
| STATS abandon_rate = SUM(RATE(weblogic.jta.transactions.abandoned))

TS metrics-oracle_weblogic.otel-*
| WHERE weblogic.jta.transactions.abandoned IS NOT NULL
| STATS abandon_rate = SUM(RATE(weblogic.jta.transactions.abandoned))

TS metrics-oracle_weblogic.otel-*
| WHERE weblogic.jta.transactions.active IS NOT NULL
| STATS active_txn = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(weblogic.jta.transactions.active))

TS metrics-oracle_weblogic.otel-*
| WHERE weblogic.jta.transactions.active IS NOT NULL
| STATS active_txn = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(weblogic.jta.transactions.active))

TS metrics-oracle_weblogic.otel-*
| WHERE weblogic.jta.transactions.total IS NOT NULL
| STATS total_rate = SUM(RATE(weblogic.jta.transactions.total)), committed_rate = SUM(RATE(weblogic.jta.transactions.committed))
| EVAL commit_pct = CASE(total_rate > 0, ROUND(committed_rate / total_rate * 100, 1), 100)

TS metrics-oracle_weblogic.otel-*
| WHERE weblogic.jta.transactions.total IS NOT NULL
| STATS total_rate = SUM(RATE(weblogic.jta.transactions.total)), committed_rate = SUM(RATE(weblogic.jta.transactions.committed))
| EVAL commit_pct = CASE(total_rate > 0, ROUND(committed_rate / total_rate * 100, 1), 100)

TS metrics-oracle_weblogic.otel-*
| WHERE weblogic.workmanager.threads.stuck IS NOT NULL
| STATS stuck = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(weblogic.workmanager.threads.stuck))

TS metrics-oracle_weblogic.otel-*
| WHERE weblogic.workmanager.threads.stuck IS NOT NULL
| STATS stuck = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(weblogic.workmanager.threads.stuck))

TS metrics-oracle_weblogic.otel-*
| WHERE weblogic.workmanager.requests.pending IS NOT NULL
| STATS pending = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(weblogic.workmanager.requests.pending))

TS metrics-oracle_weblogic.otel-*
| WHERE weblogic.workmanager.requests.pending IS NOT NULL
| STATS pending = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(weblogic.workmanager.requests.pending))

TS metrics-oracle_weblogic.otel-*
| WHERE weblogic.jta.transactions.committed IS NOT NULL
| STATS committed = SUM(RATE(weblogic.jta.transactions.committed)), rolled_back = SUM(RATE(weblogic.jta.transactions.rolled_back)), abandoned = SUM(RATE(weblogic.jta.transactions.abandoned)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-oracle_weblogic.otel-*
| WHERE weblogic.jta.transactions.committed IS NOT NULL
| STATS committed = SUM(RATE(weblogic.jta.transactions.committed)), rolled_back = SUM(RATE(weblogic.jta.transactions.rolled_back)), abandoned = SUM(RATE(weblogic.jta.transactions.abandoned)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-oracle_weblogic.otel-*
| WHERE weblogic.jta.transactions.active IS NOT NULL
| STATS active = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(weblogic.jta.transactions.active)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.server
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-oracle_weblogic.otel-*
| WHERE weblogic.jta.transactions.active IS NOT NULL
| STATS active = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(weblogic.jta.transactions.active)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.server
| SORT time_bucket ASC

attributes.title: Work Manager Request Rate by Application

query.esql:
TS metrics-oracle_weblogic.otel-*
| WHERE weblogic.workmanager.requests.completed IS NOT NULL
| STATS rate = SUM(RATE(weblogic.workmanager.requests.completed)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.application
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-oracle_weblogic.otel-*
| WHERE weblogic.workmanager.requests.completed IS NOT NULL
| STATS rate = SUM(RATE(weblogic.workmanager.requests.completed)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.application
| SORT time_bucket ASC

attributes.title: Work Manager Pending Requests by Application

query.esql:
TS metrics-oracle_weblogic.otel-*
| WHERE weblogic.workmanager.requests.pending IS NOT NULL
| STATS pending = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(weblogic.workmanager.requests.pending)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.application
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-oracle_weblogic.otel-*
| WHERE weblogic.workmanager.requests.pending IS NOT NULL
| STATS pending = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(weblogic.workmanager.requests.pending)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.application
| SORT time_bucket ASC

attributes.title: Stuck Threads Over Time by Application

query.esql:
TS metrics-oracle_weblogic.otel-*
| WHERE weblogic.workmanager.threads.stuck IS NOT NULL
| STATS stuck = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(weblogic.workmanager.threads.stuck)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.application
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-oracle_weblogic.otel-*
| WHERE weblogic.workmanager.threads.stuck IS NOT NULL
| STATS stuck = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(weblogic.workmanager.threads.stuck)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.application
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-oracle_weblogic.otel-*
| WHERE attributes.workmanager IS NOT NULL
| STATS stuck = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(weblogic.workmanager.threads.stuck)), pending = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(weblogic.workmanager.requests.pending)), completed_rate = SUM(RATE(weblogic.workmanager.requests.completed)) BY attributes.server, attributes.application, attributes.workmanager
| SORT stuck DESC, pending DESC
| LIMIT 50

TS metrics-oracle_weblogic.otel-*
| WHERE attributes.workmanager IS NOT NULL
| STATS stuck = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(weblogic.workmanager.threads.stuck)), pending = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(weblogic.workmanager.requests.pending)), completed_rate = SUM(RATE(weblogic.workmanager.requests.completed)) BY attributes.server, attributes.application, attributes.workmanager
| SORT stuck DESC, pending DESC
| LIMIT 50
